data.fix_hint: No SEC filing excerpts were retrieved. To find State Street SPY S&P 500 ETF Trust portfolio holdings and schedule of investments, search for the most recent N-PORT-P filing (quarterly portfolio holdings report) or N-1A filing (prospectus) for the SPY fund. Try queries like "SPY portfolio holdings N-PORT" or search directly for State Street S&P 500 ETF Trust filings on EDGAR.
